notes.text: Required field validation in inline creation rows now fires only when focus moves away from the row, not each time the user tabs between cells within the same row
We've resolved an issue where copy, edit, or delete actions failed with an error after discarding a draft on the object page
We've resolved an issue where cells hidden using the UI.Hidden annotation became visible after changing the table column layout
We've resolved an issue where browser refresh didn't restore table data on list report pages configured with mandatory filters and additional bindings
We've resolved an issue where error messages from a failed save were lost on sub-object pages, preventing the message popover from showing the backend validation errors
We've resolved an issue where navigating back from a full-page application displayed an empty table due to search queries executing before saved filter values were restored
